meta.note: Manual overrides for the shares-outstanding feed (scripts/ingest/shares-outstanding.ts), keyed by RupeeVest fincode. Two forms: (a) "symbol" forces a screener.in company slug, e.g. https://www.screener.in/company/HDFCBANK/ -> "HDFCBANK" (use when the autocomplete top-hit is wrong/ambiguous); (b) "sharesOutstanding" supplies the figure directly for names screener.in can't serve (e.g. foreign stocks), skipping the scrape.

279017.note: Alphabet Inc Class A (GOOGL) - US stock, not on screener.in. Class A shares outstanding ~5.8B; foreign holding so % of o/s is ~0. Update if materially stale.
